title: Long Transcript Boundary

summaryCharacteristics: Captures the multi-person kickoff sync discussing R2 storage, Whisper API, D1 database setup, and Vitest testing

requiredActions.description: Provision R2 buckets and define ACLs
requiredActions.evidence: David: I'll own provisioning the R2 buckets and setting up initial ACLs. I can have that done by next Wednesday.
Sarah: I'll work on the transcription retry mechanism to handle provider rate-limits. I can draft that by Friday.
David: I can also look at the D1 database schemas for auditing. I'll get those schemas drafted by next Friday.
Rajeev: I'll configure the Vitest environment and write standard integration wrappers. Let's target next Monday for that.

requiredEvidencePhrases: David: I'll own provisioning the R2 buckets and setting up initial ACLs.
Sarah: I'll work on the transcription retry mechanism
David: I can also look at the D1 database schemas
Rajeev: I'll configure the Vitest environment
prohibitedOutputCharacteristics: Dropping any of the 4 required actions due to length limits or truncation
Confusing the two tasks assigned to David

scoringNotes: Verify that all 4 actions are present. Verify that David is correctly assigned both the R2 bucket and D1 schema tasks.
